titleStmt.title: SII 26.558: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 558. (A.R. No. 528 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Śri-Vallabhadēva: Ś 1505 and year 21, Subhānu, Dakshiṇāyaṉa, Śarat-iṟtu, Vṛiśchika (Kārttigai) 19, ba. 10, Thursday, Hastam = 1583 A.D., November 28. The day in the month Vriśchika was = 29.

summary.p: This inscription is in Tamil and Grantha characters. The language is corrupt and it is incomplete.

The king is given the birudas as in No. 553 above. It records the gift made by the ruler on the request of Abirāma Savundira Varatuṅgarāmaṉ to the temple servants Viśvanāta Maḻavarāyaṉ and others of land and a housesite and a garden to perform the duties attached to the 19th kottu of the temple of Viśvanātha. A list of several servants of the temple is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu siThe engraver wrote si for sa rḍāyyametat sattam camatta curamavulipi cātaṉam vicuvaṉātaṟki campoṟceti cā
cuvatam Āticaṇṭecura Ākkiṉaiyam cakāttam 1000 5 100 5l meṟcellāniṉṟa cobhikkiṟa puva
ṉekavira cantirakulappiṟa vira centamaṅkaḷap puravarāticura kṣayumātura nāraciṅka keraḷa ta
motivākara coḷacintu vaṭavāmukānala cākittiya cāṟuvapūma teyvap pirāmaṇat tāpaṉācāriya
cotticiri koccaṭilapaṉmarāṉa tiṟipuvaṉac cakkaravatti koṉermai koṇṭāṉ śrī ḷumā
ḷ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ Ativirarāmaṉāṉa śrīvallavatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 vatu cupāṉu caṅ(ṅ)ccarat
tu tekṣaṇāyaṉattu cararituvil viriccikarevi 10 9§yum Amarapakkiṣattu tecami yum kuruvāra
mum cavupākkiya yokamum vaṇicakaramum peṟṟa Atta nakkiṣattirattu nāḷ viccuvaṉāta maḻavarā
yaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭāṟku nayiṉār koyil 10 9ṅ kottu kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka nilamum maṉaiyum
toṭṭamum toṭṭakkūṟum coṟu cuvantiramum kuṭutta kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu naṅkumāraṉ Apirāma cavuntira
varatuṅkarāmaṉ Olainampiyākiṟa turkkacāṟṟi kulāviṭukaiyil namvācaṟkāriyam tta
tipaṉātaṉum kaṭaikkūṭṭuk kaṇakku caṭaikkuṭṭiyum kāriyakkaṇakku perumāṉum kaṇkāṇikkaṇa
kku meyakkum perumāḷ parākkiṟamapāṇṭiya mutaliyum nam Accakaril kulacekara paṭṭaṉum toṇṭarkaḷ kaṇakku
periya Uṭaiyāṉum Olai Eḻuttukkaṇakku tirukkuggalamuṭaiyāṉūm taṉmacātaṉa kaṇakku caṅ
karanayiṉāṉ cilaittoṇṭamāṉum (māṉum) tavaṇaikkaṇakku Aḻakaṉ perumāḷum ceṉāpati kaṇakku
cuntaranayiṉāṉum muttiraikkaṇakku Arikara puttiraṉ māttāṇṭaṉum taṉmikaḷ kaṇakku kulacekara
paṭṭaṉum nam Ālaiyak kaṇakku Arikecura tevaṉumIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.558 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
